---
title: "Reference"
author: "Dylan Gong"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{5. Reference}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">
  body {
    font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
    font-size: 12pt;
    line-height: 2.0;   
    text-align: justify; 
  }
  
  .main-container {
    max-width: 940px; 
  }
  
  .reference-list p {
    text-align: left;           
    padding-left: 2em;    
    text-indent: -2em;
    margin-bottom: 1.5em;
    word-wrap: break-word;      
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;    
  }
</style>
```

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

<div class="reference-list">

<p> Bilintoh, T. M., Pontius, R. G., Jr., & Zhang, A. (2024). Methods to compare sites concerning a category’s change during various time intervals. GIScience & Remote Sensing, 61(1), Article 2409484. https://doi.org/10.1080/15481603.2024.2409484

<p> Copernicus Climate Data Store. (n.d.). Land cover classification gridded maps from 1992 to present derived from satellite observations. https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/datasets/satellite-land-cover?tab=overview

<p> OECD. (2025). Regional development in Peru: Territorial organisation and performance. In Regional development policy in Peru. OECD Publishing. https://www.oecd.org/en/publications/regional-development-policy-in-peru_66979f16-en/full-report/regional-development-in-peru-territorial-organisation-and-performance_97e14d52.html  

<p> Butler, R. A. (2007, August 30). Peru’s deforestation rate surged in 2005. Mongabay. https://news.mongabay.com/2007/08/perus-deforestation-rate-surged-in-2005/

</div>
